// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

namespace TestNamespace
{
    partial class OrderStatus
    {
        private static readonly Dictionary<int, OrderStatus> _byValue = new Dictionary<int, OrderStatus>()
        {
            [1] = Submitted,
            [2] = Approved,
            [3] = Rejected,
        };

        private static readonly Dictionary<string, OrderStatus> _byName = new Dictionary<string, OrderStatus>()
        {
            ["Submitted"] = Submitted,
            ["Approved"] = Approved,
            ["Rejected"] = Rejected,
        };

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets all values of OrderStatus ordered by value.
        /// </summary>
        public static IReadOnlyCollection<OrderStatus> GetAll() => _byValue.Values;

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets the OrderStatus instance from its value.
        /// </summary>
        public static OrderStatus FromValue(int value)
        {
            if (_byValue.TryGetValue(value, out var result))
                return result;
            throw new InvalidOperationException($"No OrderStatus with value {value} found.");
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets the OrderStatus instance from its name.
        /// </summary>
        public static OrderStatus FromName(string name)
        {
            if (_byName.TryGetValue(name, out var result))
                return result;
            throw new InvalidOperationException($"No OrderStatus with name '{name}' found.");
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Tries to get the OrderStatus instance from its value.
        /// </summary>
        public static bool TryFromValue(int value, out OrderStatus? result)
        {
            return _byValue.TryGetValue(value, out result);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Tries to get the OrderStatus instance from its name.
        /// </summary>
        public static bool TryFromName(string name, out OrderStatus? result)
        {
            return _byName.TryGetValue(name, out result);
        }

    }
}
